creator: kristinacors
caption: Am I The Only One Watching The Super Bowl Half Time Show Over and Over?! 😂 #bucketlistexperience #badbunny #Super Bowlhalftimeshow #latina #nfl

transcription.text: Guys, I know this sounds crazy, but I am still hype about Benito's Super Bowl performance. I'm wondering if there's some phenomenon or something to explain the energy that we're all feeling. Like, you know that feeling when you're part of the wave at a football game? Like, you feel like you're part of something bigger? Also, am I the only one that's been watching the Super Bowl performance over and over? That was just genius. It was historic. It was iconic. It was empowering. It was love. It was sa-song. It was nostalgic. Like, when he walked through that party, you know, obviously it was like the wedding reception, and you see those kids, some of them are sleeping on the chairs and like running around while like the older people are dancing. It just literally reminded me of my family parties in the 1990s. It was uniting. I am just blown away. Like, I am speechless. I'm at a loss for words. I'm gonna have to do a part two where I actually put my thoughts about the performance into words. But I will forever be so sad that I was not at the Super Bowl, but at the same time, I feel like he did such a good job of bringing the Super Bowl home and making everyone feel like they were a part of it.
